payable","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"ETH collection with soft/hard caps, OG whitelist bonus, and Safe vault forwarding  Flow: 1. Presale opens \u2014 anyone can contribute (min 0.01 ETH, max 1 ETH per wallet) 2. All ETH is immediately forwarded to a Gnosis Safe multisig vault 3. Soft cap (5 ETH) \u2014 no time limit, presale stays open until hit 4. Once soft cap is hit, hard cap phase begins (5 day timer) 5. Hard cap (12.5 ETH) or timer expires \u2192 presale closes 6. 26 OG wallets from previous presale get 10% bonus token allocation  Key differences from V1: - ETH forwarded immediately to Safe (no funds held in contract) - No time limit before soft cap - Hard cap phase has 5-day timer (starts when soft cap hit) - OG whitelist for bonus (not time-based early bird) - No refund mechanism (funds go to multisig immediately)","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"ArcaPresaleV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getAllocationWeight(address)":{"notice":"Get token allocation weight (contribution + OG bonus)"}},"notice":"Presale contract for $ARCA token on Base","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ArcaPresaleV2.sol":"ArcaPresaleV2"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ArcaPresaleV2.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf45046cc70b2033e0a26321e55bd9ef8f4ddfbb6f2c8e00028b24ef10809de26","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://abc7a90204d39fb18b2fc69ef24204e050a86af862f78974311d050b6a94e1a8","dweb:/ipfs/QmTzi9YVqXr8PtYLz5Mt5PeAmS2AuYq39Wi64ZB3enqfaZ"]}},"version":1}
